text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer! Oh, it's terrible, just awful!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer! Oh, it's terrible! Just awful!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was looking something up on my phone, and all
of a sudden, this weird thing popped up!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Something about viruses and my personal
information... What's going to happen to me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look at her phone, and it's merely a pop-up ad.
choice_data_list: There's no problem. You can relax.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whew, thank goodness... That really threw me for
a loop.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I know I should learn how to use this thing properly, but it's just so hard to figure out. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All that worrying really seems to have worn
Maruzensky out...
